allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "c:\\Projetos\\avalia_service" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \(-not \(Test-Path "c:\\Projetos\\avalia_service"\)\) { Write-Host "Directory is empty/new" })
